faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all products. Items must be in original condition with all packaging. To initiate a return, contact our customer service team.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping is available for 2-3 business days delivery. International orders may take 10-15 business days.

faqs.question: Do you offer free shipping?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer free shipping on orders over $50. For orders under $50, standard shipping is $5.99 and express shipping is $12.99.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All payments are secured with SSL encryption.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships. You can use this number to track your package on our website or directly on the shipping carrier's website.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your order within 24 hours of purchase. After that, the order enters the fulfillment process and cannot be cancelled. Contact support immediately if you need to cancel.

faqs.question: Do you have a warranty?
faqs.answer: Most of our products come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. Extended warranties are available for purchase at checkout.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You can reach our customer support team via email at support@example.com, phone at 1-800-123-4567, or live chat on our website. We're available Monday-Friday, 9am-6pm EST.

faqs.question: Are your products eco-friendly?
faqs.answer: We're committed to sustainability. Many of our products are made from recycled materials, and all our packaging is recyclable or biodegradable.

faqs.question: Do you offer bulk discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer volume discounts for bulk orders. For orders of 20+ items, contact our sales team at sales@example.com for a custom quote.

faqs.question: What is your refund process?
faqs.answer: After we receive your return, we'll inspect the item and process your refund within 5-7 business days. Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to over 150 countries worldwide. International shipping costs and delivery times vary by location. Calculate shipping costs at checkout.

faqs.question: Is my personal data secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your personal and payment information. We never sell your data to third parties.

faqs.question: How often do you restock items?
faqs.answer: We restock popular items weekly. If an item is out of stock, you can sign up for email notifications to be alerted when it's back in stock.

faqs.question: Do you offer gift cards?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer digital and physical gift cards in various denominations. They never expire and can be used for any purchase on our website.
